/theforge.title: The Forge Liverpool Apartments | UK Property Investment
/theforge.description: Invest in The Forge Liverpool apartments in the £2bn Pumpfields regeneration zone. Explore prices, floor plans, amenities, rental demand and projected growth for UAE investors.
/theforge.content: The Forge offers premium Liverpool city-centre apartments in the Pumpfields regeneration zone, with resident amenities and dedicated support for UAE property investors.
bullets: Located in the £2bn Pumpfields regeneration zone
/theforge.keywords: The Forge Liverpool, Liverpool apartments for sale, Liverpool property investment, UK property investment UAE, Pumpfields regeneration, buy to let Liverpool, Liverpool rental investment
/theforge.author: The Forge Liverpool
